what is mine system IP
Check system status

System details retrieved, Ajay!

Your system IP address is: 192.168.1.100, and your system status is: Windows 11, 64-bit, 16 GB RAM, Intel Core i7. Your system is running smoothly.
how to open my local host in mobile phone

Access your localhost on your mobile phone by typing your system IP address in the phone's browser, Ajay!

To open your local host on your mobile phone, you need to access your computer's IP address on your phone's browser. First, note down your system IP address, which is 192.168.1.100. Then, on your mobile phone, open a browser and type in the IP address followed by the port number you're using, usually :8080 or :80, for example, http://192.168.1.100:8080.
